templates.template: {PLAYER} must ask for permission from the host before sitting down or getting up.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} moves without permission, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot touch the TV remote or any electronic devices.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} touches something, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must say 'There's no place like home' after every drink.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to praise the house.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the phrase, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use words containing the letter 'H'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says the letter 'H', drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must act as if they are dusting every time they speak.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't act, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink unless they are sitting on the floor.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can drink on the chair now.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks while high up, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must always have a coaster (or something similar) under their glass.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} rests the glass without protection, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say the names of the other players.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says a name, drink {DRINKS} punishment sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must ask 'Does anyone want anything from the kitchen?' every time someone drinks.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot laugh if the host doesn't laugh first.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} laughs before, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must always drink with their index finger pointing at the ceiling.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} lowers their finger, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot touch their glass with their right hand (or left if they are left-handed).
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uses the forbidden hand, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must act as if they are very tired and yawn before speaking.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} speaks with energy, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say 'Yes' under any circumstances.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says 'Yes', drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must take a small hop every time they are assigned to distribute drinks.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot make eye contact with the host.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can look at the host now.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} looks at them, drink {DRINKS} sips for being cheeky.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must say 'What a beautiful house this is!' before each challenge.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use the bathroom alone; they must be accompanied (or not go).
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} goes alone, drink {DRINKS} punishment sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must always drink while kneeling on the floor.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks while upright, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use English (or foreign) words.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uses an anglicism, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must keep their arms crossed whenever they are not drinking.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uncrosses their arms, drink {DRINKS} sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot mention names of household objects (table, chair, etc.).
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} mentions a piece of furniture, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must whisper in the host's ear every time they want to say something important.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} speaks loudly, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink unless they touch their own ear with their free hand.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the ear, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must thank the house after every drink.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to be grateful.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.
